name: Peanut Butter and Chocolate Fondue
recipeIngredient: Cubed pound cake or angel-food cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and stir in the peanut butter until smooth.
2. Heat until hot and transfer to a serving bowl.
3. Pat the fruit dry with a paper towel.
4. Brush apple and banana pieces with lemon juice.
5. Arrange a selection of fruit and cake on a platter around the fondue.
6. Dip into the fondue to eat.
7. Makes 1 1/3 cups of fondue mix.
